column1: The tables show the Northern Ireland House Price Index, standardised price and associated statistics for the series from Q1 2005 to Q4 2025
Please note the House Price Index series is now referenced to Q1 2023 = 100

The data published in these tables are based on verified residential property sales as recorded by Her Majesty Revenue & Customs.  Verified sales are defined as sales which could be matched to a domestic property in the NI Valuation List.  For further information please contact Land & Property Services using the contact details below.

A new property is defined as the first sale of a property after it has been entered into the NI Valuation List.  An existing resold property is defined as the sale of a property which already exists in the NI Valuation List.

Verified sales numbers reported for new dwellings only includes those which were in the NI Valuation List when sold.
Numbers for sales of new dwellings for the most recent two quarters are not yet complete, so they are not included in the report.
Urban - Rural Classification is sourced from NISRA Geography, more details can be found at:
Detailed description of the NISRA Urban Rural Classification

The data in these tables were published on 18 February 2026
The results for the most recent quarter are provsional and will be subject to revision when results for the next quarter are released on 20 May 2026.
Our statistical practice is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR)

Contact Details
Ciara Cunningham
Land and Property Services
